PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The petition being duly filed and noticed, and there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 28, 2020 is admitted to probate. Charles Hogan is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with limited authority. Bond is set at $101,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Isodoor Bornstein is appointed Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
